description: VMDistributedZoneCommon defines items, that are common for all zones

readyTimeout.description: ReadyTimeout is the readiness timeout for each zone update.

remoteWrite.description: RemoteWrite defines VMAgent remote write settings for given zone

updatePause.description: UpdatePause is the time the operator should wait between zone updates to ensure a smooth transition.

vmagent.description: VMAgent defines VMAgent to balance incoming traffic between VMClusters.
